report.summary: Standup v19 Apr 3: 1 agent ran since v18 — publish cycle 7 promoted 5 learn guides (ETFs, prediction markets, DEX aggregators, RWA, modular blockchains). 14 total pages promoted today across 3 publish batches. 106 learn pages on disk (+2 from v18). 27 pages remain queued. 71 total runs today = ~$6,338 human-equiv. Deploy debt at 29th escalation. BTC ~$66,650, F&G 9.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v18 → v19): 1 agent ran — publish cycle 7. Promoted 5 high-value learn guides to PUBLISHED status: crypto-etfs-guide, prediction-markets-guide, dex-aggregators-guide, real-world-assets-rwa-guide, modular-blockchains-guide. All 5 passed structural QA (H1, breadcrumbs, page.tsx confirmed). QA flags: 3/5 missing generateMetadata exports (pre-existing 'use client' pages), 0/5 have JSON-LD structured data — recommend adding Article schema. 2 stale queue entries cleaned (slug mismatches). Queue repopulated with 27 remaining pages.

CONTENT PIPELINE: 106 learn page directories on disk (+2 from v18, confirming Glamsterdam + Restaking Wars additions). 14 pages promoted to published today across 3 publish batches (9 from v18 + 5 this cycle). Pipeline depth at all-time high. 474 tweets, 47 newsletters, 99+ social cards ready.

MARKET UPDATE — BTC ~$66,650 (stable from v18): Good Friday — traditional markets closed, thin liquidity. F&G Index sustained at 9 (Extreme Fear, 4+ consecutive days sub-10). Stablecoin supply $316B ATH. DRIFT -40% from exploit still digesting. No major new market events since v18.
EGRESS NOTE: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, alternative.me, Vercel, Google Search Console. Market data carried forward from v18 (no new sources available this cycle).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v18 → v19): 1 agent run — publish cycle 7 promoted 5 pages. QA revealed metadata gaps: 3/5 pages lack generateMetadata (pre-existing 'use client' constraint), 0/5 have JSON-LD. These are non-blocking but should be addressed in a future build cycle for SEO.
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 71 agent runs across 6 types — standup×19 ($855), build×15 ($3,495), community×13 ($533), design×11 ($660), eod×10 ($630), publish×3 ($165). Total human-equiv: $6,338.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (29TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt remains CRITICAL. 106 learn pages in workspace, 14 pages promoted to published today across 3 batches. Production frozen at e3f63fc (Apr 2). Build OOM in sandbox (4GB limit) but expected to pass in Vercel CI. All content, design, social assets production-ready. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — METADATA + JSON-LD GAPS: Publish cycle 7 revealed 3/5 promoted pages missing generateMetadata exports and 0/5 having JSON-LD structured data. Carry-over from earlier batches likely has similar gaps. Recommend a dedicated metadata-fix build cycle to add Article schema across all learn pages.
P2 — QUEUE STATUS: 27 pages remain in publish queue. At current pace (~5 pages/publish cycle), ~6 more publish cycles needed to clear. 2 stale entries cleaned this cycle.
P3 — CARRY-OVER WARNINGS: 2 pages (mev-guide, solana-vs-ethereum) flagged since v6. API resilience unchanged: 0/6 rate limiting, 1/6 fallback, 3/6 missing X-Cache-Source.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 29TH ESCALATION): 71 agent runs = $6,338 human-equiv today with zero user-facing output. 14 pages promoted, 106 on disk, all polished. Time-sensitive windows still open: DRIFT exploit (-40%, users searching), Bear Market Recovery (F&G=9 sustained), Glamsterdam/Restaking Wars fresh guides. Each hour of delay = content freshness decay + missed search intent capture. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — METADATA + SEO HARDENING: Publish cycle 7 exposed systematic gaps — missing generateMetadata and JSON-LD across promoted pages. Before next major publish push, run a build cycle focused on adding Article schema and metadata exports to all learn pages. This directly impacts search visibility and rich snippet eligibility.

PRIORITY 3 — CLEAR PUBLISH QUEUE: 27 pages remain queued. At ~5/batch, 6 more publish cycles would clear the backlog. Prioritize high-intent pages (DCA strategies, bottom indicators, accumulation guides) while F&G remains at extreme fear levels — these topics align with what users are actively searching for.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $6,338 (71 runs: standup×19 $855 + build×15 $3,495 + community×13 $533 + design×11 $660 + eod×10 $630 + publish×3 $165)
